TITLE: Hello!
aboutme.intro1: Hello, I'm Giovanni. What excites me about programming is the ability to bring creative ideas to life through code.
aboutme.intro2: I am especially fascinated by the logic behind the code—how structured workflows, clear rules, and flexible elements lead to thoughtful solutions. I enjoy working in both frontend and backend because I find it thrilling to understand and design a system holistically—from the user interface to data processing in the background. I see every new challenge as an opportunity to grow, constantly learning and refining my skills.
aboutme.intro3: I draw inspiration from collaborating with others, engaging projects, and the drive to solve real problems with elegant, efficient code.
aboutme.location: I currently live in Herzberg, 90 km south of Berlin, but I am open to modern working arrangements. Remote work is no problem for me—in fact, it often allows for more focused work. Flexibility is an essential part of a developer's role for me.
aboutme.openminded: I am very open to new technologies and see lifelong learning as a natural part of my profession. I am motivated by working with current tools and frameworks, understanding new trends, and deepening my knowledge deliberately.
aboutme.problemsolving: My approach to problem-solving is analytical, creative, and solution-oriented. I break complex tasks into manageable parts, view them from different perspectives, and then develop structured solutions. I rely on a combination of creativity, persistence, and teamwork. Every challenge is also a learning opportunity—whether through new insights, team collaboration, or discovering particularly elegant solutions.
skills.intro1: I have extensive knowledge in web development—from creating static websites to implementing complex, modern web applications. I develop dynamic and responsive interfaces that adapt seamlessly to different devices.
skills.intro2: I work routinely with REST APIs and databases to build interactive and data-driven applications. Collaborating in various project teams has allowed me to continuously expand my skills in collaborative development, version control, and structured work.
skills.subheadertext: Feel free to reach out! My goal is to continuously expand my knowledge.
skills.learnings: I am particularly interested in learning the following:
portfolio.intro: Here you’ll find a selection of my work—interact with the projects to see my skills in action.
projects.join.description: Task manager inspired by the Kanban system. Create and organize tasks using drag-and-drop features, and assign users and categories.
projects.elpolloloco.description: A simple jump-and-run game based on an object-oriented approach. Help José collect coins and poison bottles to fight the killer chickens.
projects.pokedex.description: A web application that fetches Pokémon data from the PokéAPI. Browse Pokémon by types, levels, and abilities.
contact.title: Want to solve a problem?
contact.intro: Then get in touch and tell me what role I can take. With a clear focus on user needs, structured execution, and a knack for good collaboration, I bring real value—to your team and your product.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.privacy: I have read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data accordingly.
